text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, while heading back to Tracen
Academy...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec, there's a huge crowd over there! I
wonder what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It can't be anything... bad, right? I mean, we stayed off all the unlucky paths.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a raffle! ♪ Wow, Trainer! Look at the
shape of the tumbler!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It looks just like the eight trigrams of a bagua
map, don't you think? It's a perfect octagon. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Maybe these raffles originated in feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure, but it's also possible they're derived
from Shintoism or the omikuji fortune custom.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Did the raffle bring us here? Or was it the other
way around, and we willed it into existence? I
don't know how it happened...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But either way! Now we're here, we can't not give
it a try! ♪ Lend me a hand, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Copano Rickey and I pull the lever together...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Is it in our fortunes to win or lose? O raffle, show
us what the eight trigrams have in store!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We crank the tumbler together. A small plastic
ball drops from the tumbler's opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! ☆ We did it! I can't believe we won the
grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure this was no coincidence—it was a
manifestation of our fortune. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to go to a hot spring, soak up
the power of the earth that resides within the
water, and then utilize it to help everyone... or
something like that. ♪
choice_data_list: All right. Let's make a reservation right away...
All right. Let's make a reservation right away...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wait! I really want to book the trip right now
too... but feng shui has certain teachings when it
comes to hot springs.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's said that if you bathe in a hot spring located
in an auspicious direction during the third month
of the lunar year, you'll never have to worry
about kimonos again.
choice_data_list:
Only kimonos? It doesn't mean clothes in
general?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The opposite, actually. Kimonos symbolize all
kinds of assets. So basically, if we want to be
affluent in the future, I think we should go in
March.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But March this year... We have a lot planned,
don't we? There are some big races on the
schedule around then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's right. Okay, at times like this...
choice_data_list:
Maybe we should wait for the dragon veins to
calm.

Maybe we should wait for the dragon veins to
calm.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! For sure! In terms of feng shui, that'd be the
right thing to do. ☆ If we go after weathering a
really rough season, then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, what it comes down to is that we should
probably wait until next March, then restore our
meridian flows together at our own pace.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Heh. Hehehe. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it! I mean... this is a hot spring
vacation we're talking about! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We can work really hard, then have a bunch of
fun after! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super happy! ♪ ☆★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't hide her sheer excitement. I strengthen
my resolve to rack us up some wins so we can go
on our trip in high spirits next year.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That's amazing! ☆ This food could be
pretty lucky!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The person who came up with this
hamburger steak might be well-versed in feng
shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Just take a look at it. There's an orange carrot
plunged right into the dark brown meat, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
This really helps the flow of qi, and it'll make the
whole dish luckier. And on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's really nutritious! Eating something like this will
satisfy your body and soul! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And if two friends enjoy it together, it'll bring
even more happiness. ♪ C'mon, Trainer, let's go
home and eat up! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a hamburger steak that scores an A+ in both
luck and nutrients. After eating this fortune-filled
dish, Copano Rickey gets a nice energy boost.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Seeing this many carrots at once really
adds impact to the color!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Carrots... They're orange... The color orange,
huh...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Before we eat them...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Can I use your office for a bit, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Okay, that'll do it. Now to put them by the
door before we eat!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: This'll definitely bring in some good qi! The door's an entrance for good luck, too, after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but maybe this lucky zone could use a little
tidying up.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, I'm going to clean up around here
before we eat. ♪ I know what I'm doing, so you
can just leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we eat a whole load of carrots in my
freshly cleaned office. Strangely enough, they
taste twice as delicious compared to normal.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: One carrot?! Could this be... Oh no!
choice_data_list: Is it bad for the feng shui?
Is it bad for the feng shui?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Exactly! I mean, we only got one!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's too bad... and it's super frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't think feng shui really has much to do with
it—I'm pretty sure she's just plain disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Buuut I'm just being dramatic. There's no need to
let poor luck get us down. Let's appreciate the
forewarning it gives us and adjust accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: HONK, HONNNK!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Watch out for that car!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
See? Luck's a factor even when it comes to the
little things.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's just call it a day and go home. We should try
to avoid doing too much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's best to lay low on days where you're not in
great condition. After eating half of the carrot
each, we head to bed early.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tissues? Hmm. I guess some people would find
tissues disappointing, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: There are quite a few uses for them in feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know how places always get damp when
there's poor ventilation?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You can use tissues to get rid of that bad
moisture and humidity. For example...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You can use them to wipe away tears of frustration. Whimper...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, she's clearly disappointed.
The tissues might wipe away her tears, but they
won't help with the frustration.
